# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    nginx \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    supervisor \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    python3-venv \
    netcat-openbsd \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor /run/postgresql /var/lib/postgresql /var/log/nginx /var/www/html

RUN chown -R postgres:postgres /run/postgresql /var/lib/postgresql

RUN printf '%s\n' \
'events {}' \
'http {' \
'    server {' \
'        listen 80 default_server;' \
'        listen [::]:80 default_server;' \
'        root /var/www/html;' \
'        index index.html;' \
'        location / {' \
'            try_files $uri $uri/ =404;' \
'        }' \
'    }' \
'}' > /etc/nginx/nginx.conf

RUN printf '%s\n' \
'[supervisord]' \
'nodaemon=true' \
'user=root' \
'' \
'[program:postgresql]' \
'command=/usr/lib/postgresql/*/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/data' \
'priority=10' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'startsecs=5' \
'user=postgres' \
'' \
'[program:redis]' \
'command=redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf --protected-mode no' \
'priority=20' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'startsecs=5' \
'' \
'[program:api]' \
'command=python3 /opt/api/server.py' \
'priority=30' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'startsecs=2' \
'' \
'[program:nginx]' \
'command=nginx -g "daemon off;"' \
'priority=40' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'startsecs=2' > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf

RUN mkdir -p /opt/api && printf '%s\n' \
'from http.server import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, HTTPServer' \
'' \
'class H(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):' \
'    def do_GET(self):' \
'        body = b"API server is running\n"' \
'        self.send_response(200)' \
'        self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/plain")' \
'        self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(body)))' \
'        self.end_headers()' \
'        self.wfile.write(body)' \
'' \
'HTTPServer(("0.0.0.0", 8080), H).serve_forever()' \
> /opt/api/server.py

RUN sed -i "s/^port .*/port 6379/" /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i "s/^bind .*/bind 0.0.0.0 ::1/" /etc/redis/redis.conf || true

RUN mkdir -p /var/lib/postgresql/data && chown -R postgres:postgres /var/lib/postgresql/data

VOLUME ["/var/lib/postgresql/data"]

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
